items.blinded_text: The Election A A will be held on relative-date-1 , to elect the mayor of City A, California. If no candidate receives a majority of the vote, a runoff Election A will be held on relative-date-2 . This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this Election A. The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified Election A. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking. If the results are not known definitively by relative-date-3 , specified-time ET, this market will resolve to "Other". This market will resolve based on the results of this Election A as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the city and county of City A.

question: Will Candidate A finish second in the first round of the Election A A?
